## TRM1.5. Average departure delay from all causes per flight (PI#3)

Vienna is the only Austrian airport subject to the monitoring of this indicator. The delay in 2025 decreased to 12.85 min/dep, lower than the value of 2024 -- last year of RP3 -- 16.8 min/dep, a reduction of 24%.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of all causes pre-departure delay across Member States in 2025 was 16.47 min/dep.
